files.notes: The file contains two distinct articles: 'Notes from the Field' by Amy Brown Lyman which includes priesthood conventions information and field reports, followed by 'Guide Lessons for March' which contains theological lessons. The split is clear based on the major section headings and content changes.

files.notes: This file contains four distinct lesson sections for March: Lesson I (Theology), Work and Business topic, Lesson III (Literature on Mark Twain), and Lesson IV (Social Service on Child Welfare). Each lesson has its own questions and problems section. The lessons are clearly delineated with Roman numeral headings and subject matter changes.
